name: Strassen Matrix Multiplication
description: Multiply two 4×4 matrices using Strassen's algorithm with 7 multiplications instead of 8.
intuition: Divide each matrix into 2×2 blocks. Compute 7 clever sub-products (M1..M7) using only 7 multiplications. Recombine to get the 4 result blocks. O(n^2.807) vs naive O(n^3).
